## The Vermintide

![][image1]

### Vermintide Special Rules

**Warp Tunnels.** Your SKAVEN models have the BURROW Keyword.

**Conniving Power Struggle.** During a campaign, keep track of the Conniving Points of each of your Elite models, beginning at 10 for your Warband leader and 0 for each other Elite, including when a new Elite is recruited or a model is promoted to Elite.

Your Elite models gain Conniving Points under the following circumstances:

* **Crush-Win.** Your Warband leader gains D3 Conniving Points whenever you win a battle, or 1 if you tie.  
* **Think-Plan.** Each model besides your Warband leader automatically gains D3 Conniving Points at the end of each battle, or 3 if you lost the battle.  
* **Look-Look.** An Elite model gains 1 Conniving Point each time the model performs a Glorious Deed.  
* **Kill-Kill Them.** An Elite model gains 1 Conniving Point each time the model takes an enemy Elite model Out of Action.  
* **Not Me.** Whenever one of your Elite models is taken Out of Action, each of your other Elite models within 12” of it gains 1 Conniving Point.

*Masterstroke*  
At the end of each battle, following the exploration step, if your Warband leader has 20 or more Conniving Points and none of your other Elites have more Conniving Points than it, its plans to suppress its allies come to fruition in a masterstroke. You earn 2 Glory and your Warband leader earns 2 additional XP. Then reset your Warband leader to Conniving Points equal to 10 minus 2 for every time it has achieved a masterstroke since it last became your Warband leader, and the rest of your Elites’ Conniving Points to 0\.

*Power Upset*  
At the end of each battle, following the exploration step, if any of your Elites besides your warband leader has more Conniving Points than your Warband Leader, that model attempts to take greater control of your Warband in an upset. If two or more of your Elites meet this requirement, only the one with the highest Conniving Points does this. Choose randomly in case of a tie. When this happens, roll a D6 to determine what happens:

* **1: Banishment.** The upsetting Elite model is removed from your Warband.  
* **2: Beaten Down.** The upsetting Elite model must roll on the Elite Trauma table.  
* **3-4:** **Grudging Respect.** You earn 1 Glory and the upsetting Elite model earns 1 additional XP.  
* **5-6: Ascension.** The upsetting Elite model becomes your new Warband leader. Your previous leader loses the LEADER Keyword and the upsetting Elite model gains it. You earn 2 Glory and the chosen Elite model earns 2 additional XP.

Regardless of the result, reset your Warband leader to 10 Conniving Points, and the rest of your Elites to 0\.

### Vermintide Patrons

Your patron must be The Great Horned Rat.

#### Patron: The Great Horned Rat

* **Choking Fumes.** Enemies within 1” of this model that do not have NEGATE GAS have \-1 DICE to all Success Rolls.  
* **Mindless And Rabid.** This model gains FEAR if it does not already have it.  
* **Obscenely Good Fortune.** This model begins each battle with D3 BLESSING MARKERS.  
* **Scurrying Menace.** This model gains the SKIRMISHER Keyword if it does not already have it, and it can move an additional 2” when it uses SKIRMISHER.  
* **Truly Ravenous.** Once during each of its Activations, when this model inflicts 1 or more BLOOD MARKERS on an enemy with a melee attack, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from this model.  
* **Vermindoom Vanguard.** This model has \+1 INJURY DICE with its melee attacks.

### Vermintide Armoury

#### Ranged Weapons

Arc Rifle			25 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Flamer			30 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Doomrocket			40 credits (Warlock Only)  
Grav Gun			15 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Grenade Launcher		40 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Hotshot Lasgun		30 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Plasma Gun		30 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Warpfuel Rifle		10 credits  
Warpfuel Shotgun		20 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Warpvolt Obliterator		25 credits (Warlock Only)

#### Pistols

Grav Pistol		20 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Hand Flamer	20 credits (LIMIT: 1, Elite Only)  
Hotshot Laspistol	25 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Plasma Pistol	20 credits (LIMIT: 2, Elite Only)  
Warpfuel Pistol	6 credits

#### Heavy Ranged Weapons

Grav Cannon	45 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Heavy Arc Rifle	35 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Heavy Flamer	55 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Mining Laser	25 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Mole Launcher	50 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Plasma Cannon	4 Glory (LIMIT: 1\)  
Warpfuel Jezzail	25 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Warpvolt Scourger	35 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Windlauncher	40 credits (LIMIT: 1\)

#### Thrown Weapons

Gunk Bombs		7 credits  
Plasma Bombs		10 credits  
Poisoned Stars		7 credits (Night Runner   
Only)  
Throwing Knives		5 credits (Night Runner   
Only)  
Toxin Grenades		10 credits (Elite or   
Globodier Only)

#### Basic Melee Weapons

Bayonet	 		2 credits  
Blade			4 credits  
Bludgeon			1 credits  
Close Combat Weapon	3 credits  
Halberd			7 credits  
Paired Blades		12 credits (Deathmaster   
       or Night Runner Only)

#### Special Melee Weapons

Foetid Blade	7 credits (Plague Monk Only)  
Force Rod		3 credits (Psyker Only)  
Force Staff		10 credits (Psyker Only)  
Goad Lance	20 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Herding Whip	7 credits (LIMIT: 1, Packmaster   
Only)  
Plague Censer	12 credits (Plague Monk Only)  
Plasma Blade. 	15 credits (LIMIT: 3\)  
Poison Blade	7 credits (LIMIT: 3, Elite or Night   
Runner Only)  
Piston Claw		15 credits (Elite Only, Max 1  
per model)  
Taser Goad		15 credits (LIMIT: 3\)  
Things Catcher	10 credits (LIMIT: 1, Packmaster   
Only)  
Warpfire Gauntlet	40 credits (LIMIT: 1, Psyker Only)  
Warpforged Dagger	15 credits (LIMIT: 1, Psyker Only)  
Warpstone Staff	2 Glory (LIMIT: 1, Psyker Only)  
Woe Stave		10 credits (LIMIT: 1, Plague  
Monk Only)

#### Heavy Melee Weapons

Doomflayer Gauntlets	35 credits (Rat Ogryn Only)  
Grinderfists			45 credits (Rat Ogryn Only)  
Heavy Plasma Blade	18 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Shock Gauntlets		35 credits (Rat Ogryn Only)  
Two-Handed Blade		12 credits  
Two-Handed Hammer	10 credits  
Warpgrinder		45 credits (LIMIT: 1, Skaven   
       Weapons Team Only)

#### Equipment

Augury Scanner		10 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Book of Woes		10 credits (LIMIT: 1, Plague  
Monk Only)  
Combat Helmet		5 credits (Headgear)  
Chaos Icon			15 credits  
Filter Plugs			5 credits  
Grapnel Launcher		3 credits (LIMIT: 3\)  
Musical Instrument		15 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Photo Goggles		3 credits  
Scope			2 Glory (LIMIT: 2\)  
Shovel			5 credits  
Skavenbrew		10 credits (LIMIT: 3,   
Skavenslave or   
Clanrat Only   
CONSUMABLE)  
Troop Flag	  		1 Glory (LIMIT: 1\)  
Vox Unit			5 credits (LIMIT: 1\)  
Warp Shovel		15 credits (LIMIT: 3,   
Clanrat Only)  
Warpstone Charm		2 Glory (LIMIT: 1\)  
Wolf Rat Mount		40 credits (LIMIT: 3,   
Clawlord, Clanrat, or  
Stormvermin Only)

#### Armour

Standard Armour   	15 credits  
Heavy Armour	35 credits  
Power Armour       	40 credits (Elite, Stormvermin, or   
Rat Ogryn Only)  
Shield		10 credits (LIMIT: 5\)  
Heavy Shield	15 Credits (Rat Ogryn Only)

#### Cyberteknika Equipment

Cranial			5 credits  
Ocular			10 credits  
Sindexterous		10 credits  
Motive			5 credits  
Torsonic			25 credits (LIMIT: 2\)  
Vascular			20 credits (LIMIT: 2\)

### Vermintide Unique Battlekit

#### Vermintide Ranged Weapons

* **Doomrocket.** 24”, \-1 DICE, \+1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE COVER, BLAST 2”, SCATTER, SHRAPNEL, TWO-HANDED, on a roll of 2, the attack hits the attacker’s location instead of normal scatter  
* **Warpfire Gauntlet.** 8”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-1 INJURY DICE, FIRE, PISTOL  
* **Warpfuel Rifle.** 24”, \+1 DICE, RISKY, TWO-HANDED, roll on the injury table on a miss, Scope  
* **Warpfuel Shotgun.** 12”, \+1 DICE, ASSAULT, RISKY, SHOTGUN, TWO-HANDED, roll on the injury table on a miss, Shield Combo  
* **Warpvolt Obliterator.** 16”, \-1 INJURY DICE, AUTOMATIC 2, RISKY, STUN, TWO-HANDED

#### Vermintide Pistols

* **Warpfuel Pistol.** 12”, \+1 DICE, PISTOL, RISKY, roll on the injury table on a miss

#### Vermintide Heavy Ranged Weapons

* **Warpfuel Jezzail.** 36”, \+1 DICE, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY, RISKY, TWO-HANDED, roll on the injury table on a miss, Shield Combo, Scope  
* **Warpvolt Scourger.** 18”, AUTOMATIC 2, HEAVY, RISKY, STUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Windlauncher.** 36”, \-1 INJURY DICE, BLAST 3”, GAS, IGNORE ARMOUR, IGNORE COVER, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED

#### Vermintide Thrown Ranged Weapons

* **Plasma Bombs.** 6”, ASSAULT, BLAST 2”, FIRE, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, RISKY, THROWN  
* **Poison Stars.** 6”, GAS, IGNORE LONG RANGE, THROWN

#### Vermintide Melee Weapons

* **Foetid Blade.** Melee, INFECTION MARKERS  
* **Herding Whip.** Melee, ASSAULT, IGNORES LONG RANGE, WHIP 3”. Friendly BEAST models within 6” of the wielder have \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Piston Claw.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Plague Censer.** Melee, GAS, TWO-HANDED. Enemies within 1” of the wielder that do not have NEGATE GAS have \-1 DICE to all Success Rolls.  
* **Things Catcher.** Melee, CRITICAL, STUN. Enemies cannot Retreat from the wielder.  
* **Warpforged Dagger.** Melee, PSYCHIC, RISKY, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from wielder on a hit that causes any BLOOD MARKERS or that takes the target Out of Action.  
* **Warpstone Staff.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC, RISKY, additional \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword  
* **Woe Stave.** Melee, BLOCK, INFECTION MARKERS

#### Vermintide Heavy Melee Weapons

* **Doomflayer Gauntlets.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, additional \+1 INJURY DICE during activating in which attacker Charged, comes as a pair of two weapons  
* **Grinderfists.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, HEAVY, comes as a pair of two weapons. The equipped model gains the DEEP STRIKE Keyword.  
* **Shock Gauntlets.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY, STUN, comes as a pair of two weapons.  
* **Warpgrinder.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, IGNORE ARMOUR, HEAVY, RISKY, TWO-HANDED. The equipped model gains the DEEP STRIKE Keyword.

#### Vermintide Equipment

* **Book of Woes.** HELD. As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, the equipped model can choose one enemy model it can see within 12”. On a success, that enemy gains 1 BLOOD MARKER. On a Critical Success, that enemy gains D3 BLOOD MARKERS instead.  
* **Skavenbrew (CONSUMABLE).** The equipped model has \+1 DICE to Hit with all melee attacks, Injury rolls against it have \-1 DICE, and it ignores its Cowardice Ability. At the end of each of the model’s Activations, it gains 1 BLOOD MARKER.  
* **Warp Shovel.** Counts as a Shovel, but the equipped model also gains the DEEP STRIKE Keyword.  
* **Warpstone Charm.** You can spend STUN MARKERS as if they were BLOOD MARKERS for Injury rolls caused by the equipped model’s melee attacks.  
* **Wolf Rat Mount.** The equipped model is mounted on a giant wolf rat. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the SKIRMISHER and MOUNTED Keywords, a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, and it is equipped with Snapping Jaws, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Skittering Mount ability.  
  * **Snapping Jaws.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE during activating in which attacker Charged. This weapon can be used alongside any other melee weapon when the rider takes the Fight Action, and does not suffer off-hand penalties.  
  * **Skittering Mount.** The rider has \+1 DICE to all Dash, Climb, and Jump Success Rolls.

### Vermintide Campaign Shop

During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.

* **Brass Orb (8 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** 8”, ASSAULT, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, PSYCHIC, THROWN, can target an ally. Does not cause any injury. Instead, on a hit, the target is removed from the battlefield (it is not taken Out of Action; it counts as Down for Morale purposes). Place a Tear marker at its location. It remains in its current state (Down, markers, etc.). At the start of the next Turn, or the end of the game, whichever comes first, the owner of that model sets it back up anywhere within 3” of the Tear marker, then remove the Tear marker. Once this attack hits, it cannot be used against this battle.  
* **Farskitter Cloak (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Non-Deathmaster Elite Only).** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the equipped model can attempt to teleport. On a success, you can pick up the equipped model and deploy it on the battlefield anywhere within 6" of the location it originally occupied (measured from the centre of its base to the centre of its base). If this is impossible for any reason, the equipped model must stay in its original position. Note that the equipped model can redeploy even if it is down or within 1" of an enemy model (in which case the enemy model cannot make a Melee Attack before the equipped model is redeployed), and can deploy within 1" of an enemy model.  
* **Foulhide (6 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** The equipped model has the TOUGH Keyword.  
* **Gnawbomb (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, IGNORES ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, SCATTER, STUN, THROWN, place a Gnawhole marker as close as possible to the final target. Your models with DEEP STRIKE can be deployed anywhere within 3” of the Gnawhole marker when using that Keyword, regardless of enemies, and they are not adjusted by D3” when doing so. This weapon can be used only once during each battle.  
* **Lash of Fangs (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, ASSAULT, CRITICAL, SHRAPNEL, VICIOUS 11, WHIP 3”.  
* **Rabid Crown (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Headgear).** Friendly BEAST models within 6” of the wielder have \+1 DICE to Hit with all melee attacks.  
* **Rustcursed Armour (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Armour).** \-2 to Injury rolls, IMPERVIOUS  
* **Shadow Magnet Trinket (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** Ranged attacks have \-1 DICE to Hit the equipped model.  
* **Shield of Distraction (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Counts as a Shield, including \-1 to Injury rolls. Enemies cannot target the equipped model with melee attacks if there is another legal target for that attack, and enemies cannot declare a Charge against the equipped model if there is another legal target of that Charge within 3” of the equipped model.  
* **Staff of Rightful Supremacy (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Psyker Only).** Melee, PSYCHIC, \+1 INJURY DICE against DAEMON and PSYKER models. HELD. The equipped model has \+2 DICE to Deny the Witch and enemies have \-1 DICE to Deny the Witch against it.

### Ruin Psychic Discipline

* **Bile-Torrent (5 credits, Attack).** 12”, AUTOMATIC 2, INFECTION MARKERS, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Filth-Crust (5 credits, Effect).** 12”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, the target has an additional \-1 to Injury rolls, stacking with armour and shields only up to a total of \-3.  
* **Rabid-Rabid\! (3 Glory, Effect).** 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has \+1 DICE to Dash Success Rolls, and it can make an additional melee attack when it takes the Fight Action.  
* **Skitterleap (5 credits, Effect).** 12”, Up to Three between Self and Allies, Target Activation, the target has FLYING.  
* **Warp Lightning (10 credits, Attack).** 18”, AUTOMATIC 2, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
* **Wither (10 credits, Effect).** \-1 DICE, 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target gains D3 BLOOD MARKERS.

### Vermintide Elites

#### 1 Clawlord (Cost: 60 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Clawlord | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Clawlord can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment, or from the Vermintide Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Lead From the Back.** While it is within 3” of a friendly SKAVEN model, if that model is a valid target for such an attack, the Clawlord cannot be chosen as the target of any ranged attack.  
* **Scurry Away.** Enemies do not get to make a free attack when the Clawlord Retreats.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, LEADER, MASTER, SKAVEN, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Deathmaster (Cost: 85 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Deathmaster | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+2 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Deathmaster can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment, or from the Vermintide Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Running Death.** The Deathmaster has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Tunneljack.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the Deathmaster can attempt to teleport. On a success, you can pick up the Deathmaster and deploy it on the battlefield anywhere within 6" of the location it originally occupied (measured from the centre of its base to the centre of its base). If this is impossible for any reason, the Deathmaster must stay in its original position. Note that the Deathmaster can redeploy even if it is down or within 1" of an enemy model (in which case the enemy model cannot make a Melee Attack before the Deathmaster is redeployed), and can deploy within 1" of an enemy model. In addition, if the Deathmaster is within 1" of any enemy models that are not LARGE, then the Deathmaster can take 1 of the enemy models with them. If they do so, you must deploy the Deathmaster first and then deploy the enemy model within 1" of the Deathmaster. If you cannot deploy the enemy model within 1" of the Deathmaster, then the enemy model stays in its original position.  
* **Scurry Away.** Enemies do not get to make a free attack when the Deathmaster Retreats.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, INFILTRATOR, MASTER, SKAVEN, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Warlock (Cost: 45 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Warlock | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Warlock can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment, or from the Vermintide Armoury. It must be equipped with at least one PSYCHIC weapon.

The Warlock may purchase up to three powers from the Ruin Psychic Discipline, and must purchase at least one.

**Upgrades**

* **Arch-Warlock.** You can upgrade the Warlock to an Arch-Warlock at a cost of \+10 credits, allowing it to purchase up to five powers, and granting it the PSYKER 2 Keyword instead of PSYKER 1\.

**Abilities**

* **Scurry Away.** Enemies do not get to make a free attack when the Warlock Retreats.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, MASTER, PSYKER 1, SKAVEN

### Vermintide Troops

#### Skavenslave (Cost: 20 credits \+cost of weapon)

You can field only up to 2 Skavenslaves for every MASTER model you field.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Skavenslave | 6”/Infantry | \-1 | \-1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Skavenslave can be equipped with any melee weapons, pistols, armour, or equipment from the Vermintide Armoury that cost 10 credits or less. It must be equipped with at least one weapon.

**Abilities**

* **Cowardice.** The Charge Action is always a Risky Success Roll for the Skavenslave unless a friendly MASTER SKAVEN model is within 6” of the Skavenslave.  
* **Many.** When you activate a Skavenslave, activate another unactivated Skavenslave, treating them as a Fireteam, if one is available. The Skavenslave counts for only half of a model for the purpose of Field Strength and Morale. Round up after counting all Skavenslaves.  
* **Scurry Away.** Enemies do not get to make a free attack when the Skavenslave Retreats.

**Keywords**  
FIRETEAM, NO PROMOTION, SKAVEN

#### Clanrat (Cost: 35 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Clanrat | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Clanrat can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Vermintide Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Cowardice.** The Charge Action is always a Risky Success Roll for the Clanrat unless another friendly MASTER SKAVEN model is within 6” of the Clanrat.  
* **Scurry Away.** Enemies do not get to make a free attack when the Clanrat Retreats.  
* **Strength in Numbers.** The Clanrat has \+1 DICE to Hit with melee attacks made against any enemy that has at least 2 of the Clanrat’s SKAVEN allies within 1” of it. In addition, it ignores its Cowardice Ability if the target of its Charge is already in melee with at least 1 of the Clanrat’s SKAVEN allies.

**Upgrades**

* **Night Runner.** Up to 2 Clanrats, or 3 in a Warband worth 1,200 or more credits, can be upgraded to Night Runners at a cost of \+15 credits each, granting them the INFILTRATOR and STEALTH Keywords, and the Slinking Advance Ability.  
  * **Slinking Advance.** The Night Runner can Charge an enemy it cannot see, and when it does so, it ignores its Cowardice Ability.  
* **Packmaster.** Up to 1 Clanrat can be upgraded to a Packmaster at a cost of \+5 credits, granting it the MASTER Keyword.  
* **Plague Monk.** Up to 2 Clanrats, or 3 in a Warband worth 1,200 or more credits, can be upgraded to Plague Monks at a cost of \+10 credits each, granting them the Frenzied Assault Ability.  
  * **Frenzied Assault.** The Plague Monk ignores its Cowardice Ability, and it rolls 2D6 instead of 1D6 when Charging, taking the highest result.  
* **Globodier.** Up to 2 Clanrats, or 3 in a Warband worth 1,200 or more credits, can be upgraded to Globodiers at a cost of \+10 credits each, granting them the Lobber Ability.  
  * **Lobber.** Increase the range of any THROWN weapon the Globodier is equipped with by 4”. It has \+1 DICE to Hit with any such weapon.

**Keywords**  
NO PROMOTION, SKAVEN, SKIRMISHER

#### 0-5 Stormvermin (Cost: 45 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Stormvermin | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Stormvermin can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Vermintide Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Elite Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Stormvermin is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Stormvermin instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Stormvermin.

**Keywords**  
MASTER, SKAVEN

#### 0-3 Skaven Weapons Team (Cost: 40 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Weapons Team | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | 0 | 60 × 35mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Skaven Weapons Team can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Vermintide Armoury. Note that even though it is likely made up of multiple models on a base, the Skaven Weapons Team is one model for all rules purposes. It has the normal number of arms, benefits from a single helmet, etc.

**Abilities**

* **Weapon Team.** The Skaven Weapons Team can ignore the HEAVY property of one ranged weapon.

**Keywords**  
LARGE, SKAVEN

#### 0-2 Rat Ogryn (Cost: 65 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Rat Ogryn | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | 0 | 40-50mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Rat Ogryn can be equipped with any weapons besides thrown weapons, and any armour, as well as a Combat Helmet, Filter Plugs, and any Ammunition or Cyberteknika equipment, all from the Vermintide Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Warp Fury.** When the Rat Ogryn successfully Charges one or more enemies, one of those enemies suffers a BLOOD MARKER.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, LARGE, LIMITED POTENTIAL, SKAVEN, STRONG, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Doom Flayer (Cost: 145 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Doom Flayer | 10”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Doom Flayer is equipped with armour plating and its Whirling Blades, included in its price and statistics above. It can be equipped with any other weapons from the Vermintide Armoury, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo.

* **Whirling Blades.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, additional \+1 INJURY DICE during activating in which attacker Charged. This weapon can be used alongside any other melee weapon when the Doom Flayer takes the Fight Action, and does not suffer off-hand penalties.

**Abilities**

* **More-More Whirling Death\!** The Doom Flayer has \+2 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, but suffers a BLOOD MARKER after taking the Dash Action.  
* **Scurry Away.** Enemies do not get to make a free attack when the Doom Flayer Retreats.

**Keywords**  
LARGE, NO PROMOTION, SKAVEN, TOUGH, VEHICLE

### Mercenaries

You can hire the following mercenaries.

#### Daemon Mercenaries

* 0-1 Beast of Nurgle (Cost: 5 Glory) NURGLE leader only  
* 0-1 Chaos Spawn (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Daemon Prince (Cost: 7 Glory, or 8 for winged)

**Max 2 per Warband**:

* Summoned Furie (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* Summoned Bloodletter (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* Summoned Daemonette (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* Summoned Plaguebearer (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* Summoned Blue Horror (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* Summoned Pink Horror (Cost: 5 Glory) (counts as 2 choices)

#### Heretic Astartes Mercenaries

* 0-1 Black Legionnaire (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Mutilator (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Obliterator (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Plague Marine (Cost: 5 Glory) Plague Vermin Only

#### Dark Mechanicum Mercenaries

* 0-1 Hell-Forge Heretek (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Negavolt Cultist (Cost: 2 Glory)

#### Skaven Mercenaries

* 0-1 Grey Seer (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Plague Priest (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Rat Swarm (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-2 Skaven Rat (Cost: 2 Glory)

#### Other Chaos Mercenaries

* 0-2 Blessed Blades (Cost: 5 Glory for the pair, 2 Glory to replace one)  
* 0-1 Fellgor Gorehorn (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Unbound Daemonhost (Cost: 5 Glory)

### 

### Warband Variant: Plague Vermin

* **Rats of Nurgle.** All of your non-mercenary models gain the NURGLE Keyword. Your Patron must be the Nurgle Shared Patron.  
* **Priesthood of Rot.** You cannot recruit a Clawlord or Warlock. Instead, you can recruit up to 2 Plague Priest mercenaries, which count as Elites in your Warband instead of mercenaries. You must recruit at least 1 as your Warband leader, which gains the LEADER and TOUGH Keywords.  
    
  Plague Priests cost you 60 credits each, but are not automatically equipped with any battlekit and do not automatically know any psychic powers. They can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Vermintide Armoury, but must be equipped with at least one PSYCHIC weapon. They can use Plague Monk Only battlekit. They may purchase up to four psychic powers from the Ruin Psychic Discipline and/or the Contagion Discipline found in the Death Guard Warband Variant of the Heretic Astartes Faction, and must purchase at least one.  
* **Plague Monasteries.** You cannot upgrade any Clanrats to Nightrunners or Packmasters, but you can upgrade any number to Plague Monks, and your Storm Vermin can use Plague Monk Only battlekit.  
* **Plague Spreaders.** Instead of the Warp Tunnels special rule, when one of your models makes an attack with the GAS Keyword, you can choose to replace that Keyword with INFECTION MARKERS during that attack.  
* **Plague Vermin Battlekit.** You cannot take any Flamers, Hand Flamers, or Heavy Flamers, but add the following battlekit to your Armoury:  
  * **Hand Plague Spewer (10 credits, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** 6”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-1 INJURY DICE, GAS  
  * **Light Plague Censer (7 credits, Plague Priest Only).** Melee, GAS, \-1 INJURY DICE. Enemies within 1” of the wielder that do not have NEGATE GAS have \-1 DICE to all Success Rolls (does not stack).  
  * **Heavy Plague Spewer (45 credits, LIMIT: 1).** 10”, \-1 INJURY DICE, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, AUTOMATIC 2, GAS, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED  
  * **Plague Spewer (30 credits, LIMIT: 2).** 8”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, GAS, TWO-HANDED

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
